about.body: A description of the restaurant and its atmosphere.

reservation.line: A handful of tables. Reserve yours.

menu.title: Menu
menu.intro: A short menu, written each season.
menu.comingSoonSub: We're finishing the season's edition. In the meantime, the kitchen will guide you through tonight's plates at the table.

booking.intro: We confirm every booking by WhatsApp. The kitchen seats from 18:00.

meta.confirmValue: Replied on WhatsApp, usually within the hour.
meta.directValue: Reach the room directly on WhatsApp.
